title: 6 fixes — Moment upload guard, clipboard fallback, call concurrency, like spam
notes: FIX: Picking a moment photo now validates MIME (images only) + 10MB cap. Was OOM-ing Android when users picked 50MB DSLR raws.
FIX: 6 raw clipboard.writeText sites in Home + Moments now use proper helper — toast only fires on real success, falls back to legacy execCommand on Safari/WebView, shows error if both fail.
FIX: Tapping Call on another expert while your phone is ringing inbound no longer stacks two calls (was leaving the original caller staring at 'Ringing...' until timeout).
FIX: Rapid like-spam on a post no longer fires parallel RPC calls (could cause 2→3→2→1→2 flicker on error). In-flight guard per post.
FIX: Notifications realtime channel name unique-per-mount to prevent StrictMode double-subscribe collision.
